findings.title: Outdated Framework - Known RCE
findings.description: The detected framework version is affected by a known unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade to the latest patched version immediately.

findings.title: Cross Site Scripting (Reflected)
findings.description: A reflected XSS was identified in the search parameter, allowing arbitrary script execution in the victim browser context.
findings.recommendation: Contextually encode all user-controlled output and adopt a strict Content-Security-Policy.

findings.title: Exposed .git Directory
findings.description: The .git directory is publicly accessible, potentially exposing source code and history.
findings.recommendation: Review the finding and apply the relevant vendor patch or mitigation.

findings.title: Default Admin Credentials Accepted
findings.description: The admin panel accepted a well-known default credential pair.
findings.recommendation: Review the finding and apply the relevant vendor patch or mitigation.

findings.title: Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens
findings.description: No anti-CSRF token was found in a HTML submission form.
findings.recommendation: Use anti-CSRF tokens on all state-changing forms.

findings.title: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
findings.description: The Content-Security-Policy header is not set on responses, reducing defense-in-depth against XSS and data injection.
findings.recommendation: Add an appropriately scoped Content-Security-Policy header.
